questions.question: Do I need special training to offer sleep dentistry?
questions.answer: Yes, proper training is essential. Our solution includes comprehensive training resources, but we also recommend pursuing continuing education through organizations like the American Academy of Dental Sleep Medicine. Our implementation process includes training for you and your team on both the clinical aspects and how to use our software effectively.

questions.question: How does the medical billing process work?
questions.answer: Our system guides you through the medical billing process for oral appliance therapy. We provide the proper medical diagnosis codes (ICD-10) and procedure codes (CPT/HCPCS) for sleep appliances. The software helps generate proper documentation for medical necessity and can either produce claim forms for your submission or integrate with medical billing services.

questions.question: Can I integrate with home sleep testing devices?
questions.answer: Yes, our Professional and Enterprise plans include integration with popular home sleep testing devices such as WatchPAT, Nox, and ResMed ApneaLink. The system can import test data, help with interpretation, and incorporate the results into your documentation and treatment planning.

questions.question: How does physician collaboration work?
questions.answer: Our software includes templates for referral letters, consultation reports, and treatment outcome summaries specifically designed for communication with sleep physicians. The system helps you establish and maintain relationships with sleep medicine doctors, facilitating the two-way referral process that's critical for successful sleep dentistry.

questions.question: What kind of ROI can I expect from adding sleep dentistry?
questions.answer: Practices that successfully implement sleep dentistry typically see a return on investment within 3-6 months. A single oral appliance case can generate $2,500-$4,000 in revenue, with much of that potentially covered by medical insurance. Many practices find that treating just 2-4 sleep cases per month more than covers the cost of our software and significantly boosts practice profitability.

reviews.name: Dr. Jennifer Martel
reviews.comment: Implementing the Sleep Dentistry Module transformed my practice. Within six months, we were treating 8-10 sleep cases monthly, creating a significant new revenue stream. The screening integration helps us identify at-risk patients during regular hygiene visits, and the medical billing support has been invaluable.

reviews.name: Dr. Robert Chen
reviews.comment: The physician networking support helped me establish strong relationships with three local sleep doctors who now regularly refer CPAP-intolerant patients. The documentation templates ensure I'm providing exactly what the physicians need, and patients appreciate our collaborative approach to their sleep health.

reviews.name: Dr. Alisha Williams
reviews.comment: As a general dentist, I was hesitant about adding sleep dentistry services. The training and implementation support made the transition smooth and manageable. Now about 15% of our practice revenue comes from sleep appliances, and more importantly, we're helping patients with a serious health condition that was previously going unaddressed.

cta.title: Ready to Add Sleep Dentistry to Your Practice?
cta.description: Join thousands of dental practices addressing this critical health issue while growing their practice revenue.
